description:
Have the wheels come off the maglev dream?
To learn for free on Brilliant for a full 30 days, visit https://brilliant.org/TheB1M/ You’ll also get 20% off an annual premium subscription.

🔥 Pre-order Fred's book MEGA BUILDS now 👉 https://bit.ly/3Y63G6X

Full story here - https://theb1m.com/video/why-maglev-is-basically-impossible

This video contains paid promotion for Brilliant.

For more by The B1M subscribe now 👉 https://bit.ly/the-b1m
